hero.subtitle: IMARA is Rwanda's leading AI-powered agricultural platform, helping farmers increase yields, detect diseases early, and connect with markets - all from your phone.

features.title: Everything You Need to Farm Smarter

cropAdvisory.title: Crop Advisory
cropAdvisory.description: Match the right crop to your soil, climate, and yield goals.

diseaseDetection.title: Disease Detection
diseaseDetection.description: Catch crop issues early with guided photo diagnosis and action steps.

weatherIntelligence.title: Weather Intelligence
weatherIntelligence.description: Stay ahead of changing conditions with localized farm alerts.

howItWorks.title: How IMARA Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in minutes and transform your farming practices

getRecommendations.description: Our AI analyzes your data and provides personalized farming advice.

growSucceed.title: Grow & Succeed
growSucceed.description: Follow the recommendations, track your progress, and increase your yields.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Farmers Across Rwanda
testimonials.subtitle: See how IMARA is transforming agriculture for thousands of farmers

items.content: IMARA helped me double my maize yield in just one season. The crop advisory recommendations were exactly what I needed.
The disease detection feature saved my entire tomato crop. I was able to identify and treat the blight before it spread.
Our cooperative now uses IMARA for all our farming decisions. The market price alerts have improved our profits by 40%.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Farm?
cta.description: Join {{count}} farmers already using IMARA to grow better crops and increase their income. It's free to get started.

footer.tagline: Empowering Rwandan farmers with smart agricultural technology.

crops.pageSubtitle: Personalized crop recommendations based on your farm conditions
crops.conditionsBannerSubtitle: Real-time data for optimal planting decisions
crops.plantingCalendarDescription: Optimal planting windows throughout the year

maize: Plant in well-drained soil after the first rains
Space rows 75cm apart for best yields
Apply nitrogen fertilizer 4 weeks after planting
beans: Rotate with cereals to help fix nitrogen in the soil
Avoid waterlogged fields to prevent root rot
Harvest once pods turn yellow and dry
irishPotatoes: Plant in cool, well-drained, loose soil
Hill soil around stems as plants grow
Store harvested tubers in a dark, cool, ventilated place
tomatoes: Stake or cage plants to support healthy growth
Water consistently to avoid blossom end rot
Watch lower leaves closely for early signs of blight

disease.pageSubtitle: Identify plant diseases instantly with AI-powered image analysis
disease.scanCardDescription: Upload or take a photo of the affected plant for an instant diagnosis
disease.dragDropTitle: Drag and drop an image, or click to browse
disease.dragDropSubtitle: Get instant disease detection results powered by AI
disease.tipEarlyDetectionDescription: Check your crops weekly for early signs of disease to prevent widespread damage.
disease.tipPhotoTipsDescription: Take clear, well-lit photos of affected leaves for the most accurate diagnosis.
disease.tipExpertHelpDescription: Connect with a local agronomist if you need further guidance on treatment.
disease.databaseDescription: Browse common crop diseases and their treatments

maizeLeafBlight.name: Maize Leaf Blight
maizeLeafBlight.treatment: Apply fungicide and remove affected leaves to prevent spread.

beanRust.name: Bean Rust
beanRust.treatment: Apply sulfur-based fungicide and improve air circulation between plants.

tomatoEarlyBlight.name: Tomato Early Blight
tomatoEarlyBlight.treatment: Remove infected leaves and apply copper-based fungicide weekly.

maizeStreakVirus.name: Maize Streak Virus
maizeStreakVirus.symptoms: Yellow streaks along leaf veins and stunted growth.
maizeStreakVirus.prevention: Use resistant varieties and control leafhopper vectors.

cassavaMosaic.name: Cassava Mosaic Disease
cassavaMosaic.symptoms: Mottled yellow-green leaf patterns and leaf distortion.
cassavaMosaic.prevention: Plant virus-free cuttings and remove infected plants early.

bananaBacterialWilt.name: Banana Bacterial Wilt
bananaBacterialWilt.symptoms: Yellowing and wilting of leaves with premature ripening of fruit.
bananaBacterialWilt.prevention: Disinfect tools between plants and remove infected stems.

coffeeBerryDisease.name: Coffee Berry Disease
coffeeBerryDisease.symptoms: Dark, sunken lesions on berries and premature berry drop.
coffeeBerryDisease.prevention: Prune for airflow and apply copper fungicide during flowering.

riceBlast.name: Rice Blast
riceBlast.symptoms: Diamond-shaped lesions on leaves with white to gray centers.
riceBlast.prevention: Use resistant varieties and avoid excess nitrogen fertilizer.
